name: pr2136-blank-screenshot
description: Replays the PR #2136 scenario where a blank screenshot blocks merge. Validates that needs-human-review label is applied and merge is blocked when screenshot shows blank/white content.

agentScripts.response: The screenshot shows a blank white page with no visible UI components. The dashboard layout, header, timeline, and heatmap sections are not rendering.
NEEDS_REWORK: The PR shows placeholder content only. The dashboard components are not implemented - just empty divs with 'Coming soon' text.
